rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear page title with no associated monetary amounts.

rows.description: Dec. 7 8th & 9th Poor's Rate to St. Mich. Parish
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash (1/7/1). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pence as '0', stating the column was blank. Visual verification shows a faint but clear '1' in the pence column.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the eighth and ninth poor rates to St Michael's parish, amounting to £1 7s 1d.

rows.description: — 20 To Mr. Walker for Redemption of Thrup St. Tax 15s.-26£ 7s.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash (empty/7/11/0.5). gpt-5-mini misread pounds as '7' and pence as '4', and missed the half-penny fraction entirely. Visual verification confirms empty pounds, '7' shillings, '11' pence, and a clear half-penny symbol.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Walker for redemption relating to Thrupp Street tax.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Walker for redemption of the Thrupp Street tax, amount recorded as £0 7s 11.5d (note: embedded manuscript amounts also show other figures).

rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear year header with no associated monetary amounts.

rows.description: Jan. 5 Wm. Purdue's Bill 2.16.11 Mr. Judge 1.5.3

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments comprising William Purdue's bill and a separate charge for Mr Judge, together amounting to £4 2s 2d.

rows.description: — 5 Prop. Tax to St. Mich. House 1.9.4½ Cozzini 5.11¾
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash (1/5/3/0.25). gpt-5-mini incorrectly attempted to sum internal amounts and missed the farthing fraction, also misread the date as 'Jan. 8'. Visual verification confirms '1' pound, '5' shillings, '3' pence, and a '¼' farthing symbol.
rows.english_description: Property tax paid to St Michael's House and a separate payment to Cozzini recorded on the same line.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Property tax to St Michael's House and payment to Cozzini recorded together, amounting to £1 5s 3.25d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash (1/3/6). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read shillings as '13' and pence as '3'. Visual verification confirms '3' shillings and '6' pence.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of a poor rate assessment, amounting to £1 3s 6d (manuscript note gives 10s as part of the entry).

rows.description: Feb. 2 Wine Bill Domus Xmas Dr
